0.title: NumberOfMessagesPublished Sum
0.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries number_of_messages_published_sum = avg(cloud.aws.sns.number_of_messages_published_sum), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.custom_device, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(number_of_messages_published_sum) desc
| limit 20
